semantics: Site/location metadata for the DeST model.
DeST city/weather library metadata referenced by ENVIRONMENT.
notes: Likely bridge from site metadata to CLIMATE_DATA and GROUND_DATA.

semantics: Building storey records used to group rooms and provide storey height/multiplier.
Room group, room type, HVAC schedule, and setpoint grouping metadata.
notes: Candidate source for thermostat/setpoint and HVAC grouping conversion.

semantics: Room-type default/template data referenced by ROOM.TYPE, including internal gains, schedules, minimum luminance, and HVAC setpoint schedules.
notes: Current models may also materialize per-room OCCUPANT_GAINS/LIGHT_GAINS/EQUIPMENT_GAINS rows; use this table as fallback/template only until precedence is confirmed.

semantics: Room ventilation or air-exchange relation between a room and another room or boundary, with schedule and maximum setting metadata.
notes: CoA_Chongqin_2015 links rooms to OUTSIDE through schedule 4643; VENT_TYPE and VENT_SET_MAX units need Access confirmation before conversion.

semantics: Synthetic external boundary marker used by surface naming and boundary handling.
Synthetic ground boundary marker used by surface naming and boundary handling.
DeST room surface record; geometry is referenced through GEOMETRY.
Envelope relationship table linking paired DeST surfaces, construction kind, and middle plane.
Plane-to-geometry bridge for surfaces, enclosures, windows, and doors.
Geometry record pointing to a boundary loop.
Ordered point membership for a DeST geometry loop.
3D Cartesian point used by geometry loops.
Default values for model tables and fields when object-level values are zero or omitted.
notes: Currently used by window conversion to resolve WINDOW_CONSTRUCTION = 0.

semantics: Year-long DeST schedule; DATA stores 8760 hourly double values in a raw vector.

notes: Optical properties are not one-to-one with EnergyPlus; current converter uses a fallback glazing.

semantics: Glass/application material library used by windows and glazed doors.
Door construction library, including optional glazing metadata.
Window instance table linked to MAIN_ENCLOSURE and window construction libraries.
notes: Shading, curtain, and detailed type handling are not converted yet.

semantics: Per-window type performance data such as K and SC.
notes: Candidate source for future glazing optical-property reconciliation.

semantics: Door instance table analogous to WINDOW, linked to MAIN_ENCLOSURE and SYS_DOOR.

notes: The current fixture has no shading instances; postpone until a model with shading is available.

semantics: Distribution mode fractions for radiant, convective, and related heat-gain partitions.
Occupant internal gains and fresh-air requirement inputs.
Hourly weather-like data embedded in the DeST model.
notes: Likely future source for EPW generation or weather validation.

semantics: Hourly ground temperature data embedded in the DeST model.
notes: Likely future source for Site:GroundTemperature objects or EPW support.
